title: API: images remove (single image endpoint) response differs from reference
body:
**Is this a BUG REPORT or FEATURE REQUEST? (leave only one on its own line)**

/kind bug


**Description**

The schema returned by the API endpoint to remove a single image (`/libpod/images/{name}`) differs from the reference.

This affects version 3.4.x, I have not tested the development version 4.x since the project I'm working on is targeting 3.4.x and 4.x will contain breaking API changes.

**Steps to reproduce the issue:**

1. ``podman system service unix:///home/`whoami`/testing.sock --log-level=debug --time=500``

2. ``curl -X DELETE --unix-socket "/home/`whoami`/testing.sock" "http://d/v3.2.0/libpod/images/test_image_tag"``


**Describe the results you received:**
```
{
   "Deleted":[
      "acbee3e92e1cf475c801daaceb631619bc451dbeaeda15b657a2b29db0aa914b",
      "3b91537916b51bc1f9344697746d57d8a49cff4e671110656ca0393bf618b785",
      "ebdfbcd04d598a94d45c7cdcb8bfd79efa7948632cbcb2568d4fb4c50c0db7c8"
   ],
   "Untagged":[
      "localhost/test_image_tag:latest"
   ],
   "ExitCode":0,
   "Errors":[
      
   ]
}
```


**Describe the results you expected:**
```
[
   {
      "deleted":"string",
      "untagged":[
         "string"
      ]
   }
]
```


**Output of `podman version`:**

```
Version:      3.4.2-dev
API Version:  3.4.2-dev
Go Version:   go1.15.9
Git Commit:   09aade7816e096550e805869f1300d7198aa8f91
Built:        Thu Oct 21 13:36:11 2021
OS/Arch:      linux/amd64
```


**Have you tested with the latest version of Podman and have you checked the Podman Troubleshooting Guide? (https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/master/troubleshooting.md)**


Yes, latest version of 3.4.x built from source.

**Additional environment details (AWS, VirtualBox, physical, etc.):**
Windows 10, WSL, Debian Bullseye, 64bit

comments.body: @arctic-alpaca please close this, it should be fixed in `main`.
